executives.name: John Van Scoter
executives.background: Mr. Van Scoter has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since June 2023. Prior to joining Solid Power, Mr. Van Scoter served as Vice President of SRI International, a nonprofit research institute, from 2019 to 2023. From 2010 to 2018, he was the CEO and President of eSolar, Inc., a concentrated solar power technology company. Earlier in his career, he spent over 25 years at Texas Instruments.

executives.name: Kevin Papczak
executives.background: Mr. Papczak has served as our Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer since October 2021. Prior to that, he served as our Vice President of Finance and Corporate Development from 2018 to 2021. Before joining Solid Power, he held various finance and corporate development roles at several technology companies.

executives.name: Derek Johnson
executives.background: Dr. Johnson has served as our Chief Operating Officer since January 2024. He previously served as our Vice President of Operations from 2020 to 2023. Prior to joining Solid Power, Dr. Johnson was the Director of Global R&D at A123 Systems.

executives.name: James Liebscher
executives.background: Mr. Liebscher has served as our Chief Legal Officer and Secretary since June 2023. He previously served as our General Counsel from 2021 to 2023. Before joining Solid Power, he was an attorney at Bryan Cave Leighton Paisner LLP.

board_of_directors.name: John Van Scoter
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Van Scoter has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since June 2023. Prior to joining Solid Power, Mr. Van Scoter served as Vice President of SRI International, a nonprofit research institute, from 2019 to 2023.

board_of_directors.name: John Batten
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Batten has served as a member of our Board since December 2021. He is the President and Chief Executive Officer of Twin Disc, Inc., a manufacturer of power transmission equipment.

board_of_directors.name: Rainer Feurer
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Feurer has served as a member of our Board since December 2021. He is a Senior Vice President at BMW Group, where he has held various leadership positions since 1998.

board_of_directors.name: Aleksandra Miziolek
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Miziolek has served as a member of our Board since December 2021. She previously served as Senior Vice President and Chief Strategy Officer of Cooper-Standard Holdings Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Erik Oliver
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Oliver has served as a member of our Board since December 2021. He is a Partner at Richardson Oliver Law Group LLP, specializing in intellectual property strategy.

board_of_directors.name: Steven Sosman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Sosman has served as a member of our Board since December 2021. He is a Managing Director at Riverwood Capital, a private equity firm.

board_of_directors.name: MaryAnn Wright
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Wright has served as a member of our Board since December 2021. She previously served as Group Vice President of Engineering and Product Development at Johnson Controls International plc.
